queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the credit amount requested by the applicant on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account on mitigating credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of critical account status or other existing credits on reducing credit risk.
